headline: Nvidia Stock Powers Higher As AI Growth Accelerates; Earnings Loom Large
summary: It took a while to get going, but Nvidia stock has been on a tear ahead of its earnings report due Wednesday after the close.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Keysight Techs, Raises Price Target to $375
summary: Baird  analyst Richard Eastman   maintains Keysight Techs (NYSE:KEYS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $310 to $375.

headline: Keysight Technologies: Q2 Setup Points To A Beat-And-Raise
summary: Keysight Technologies is entering a multi-year monetization phase, driven by record Q1 results and strong AI and 6G demand. Learn why KEYS stock is a buy.
